name: E-5 inline suppression: --report-unused-disable-directives flags directives that did not match any violation so F-4 can track repetition
command: printf '// rubric-disable-next-line no-eval -- unused dir\nlet x = 1;\n' > in.js && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/inline-suppression.sh" --rule no-eval --in in.js --report-unused-disable-directives 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 1 ] && grep -q '\[unused-disable-directive\]' err.txt && echo unused_flagged 1>&2
